steps.title: Write the product as an expression
steps.content:
The function multiplies $x$ by a number that is \$91$ more than $x$, i.e., $x+91$.
So $$f(x)=x(x+91)=x^2+91x.$$

steps.title: Match the expression to the answer choices
steps.content:
Checking each choice, only C gives the product of $x$ and $x+91$.
That matches choice C — C is correct.
